title: Senior SEO Specialist at More Retail Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at More Retail Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at More Retail Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About More Retail Holdings Services:
More Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with More Retail Holdings Services!
